game_name: Skate or Die 2: The Search for Double Trouble

sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for NES skateboarding game

special_mechanics.name: skateboard_selection
special_mechanics.description: Player can acquire up to five different skateboards with varying physics properties. Starting board is slow with low jump height. Two progressively faster boards with higher jumping ability can replace current board. Two additional boards available later: one fast with poor jumping, one high-jumping but slow.

special_mechanics.name: trick_system
special_mechanics.description: Player learns skateboarding tricks from Lester by collecting goodies. Tricks can be customized and programmed with player-defined controls.

special_mechanics.name: halfpipe_ramp
special_mechanics.description: Double Trouble halfpipe features a large half-pipe with smaller spine ramp in middle. Two-screen sized ramp. Player has three minutes per run. Wipeout limit of three times per run.

special_mechanics.name: scoring_modifier
special_mechanics.description: If player maintains scoring streak, girlfriend CJ appears in background window and temporarily doubles points awarded for each trick.

tier_notes: Tier 3 empirical data. No precise physics parameters documented in available sources. Game features equipment-based physics variation (skateboard selection) but exact movement values not specified. Gameplay description indicates momentum-based skateboarding with variable jump heights depending on board selection.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Skate or Die 2 wiki article
Wikipedia - Skate or Die 2: The Search for Double Trouble
